TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Jacky Wu (u sulit nu Hulam: Śź≥ŚģóśÜ≤, 1962.9.26) nalecuhan i Taywan Taynan satipan. u saupu sipuuay palaway telungay. zayhan mikileh <lima ku tinghuy a kawlah> makademec sisa singangan tuway. 1978 a mihcan, u tatnenga'ay a mudadiway matahkal. 1990 a mihcan, mitelung ku saupu sipuuay palaway katukuh ayza. nay 2000 a mihcan, sayadah ku milihecian tu kalisiw, u sakacacayay. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 1990 ". u sulit nu Amilika Jacky Wu or Xian Ge, is a celebrity from Taiwan. He is an accomplished variety show host, singer and actor. He hosts and co-hosts numerous variety shows, such as long running popular Taiwanese variety show Guess. u kawlah niza Cinciu a kawlah Cicung a kawlah u dadiw-balud niza
S.PHON: *a ¶kj wu (u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam: ***, ****.*.**) nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i tajwan tajnan satipan. u saupu sipuuaj par~…ĺawaj t…ôr~…ĺuŇčaj. zajńßan mikir~…ĺ…ôńß <r~…ĺima ku tiŇčńßuj a kawr~…ĺańß> makad…ôm…ô ¶ sisa siŇčaŇčan tuwaj. **** a mińß ¶an, u tatn…ôŇča Ē~ °aj a mudadiwaj matańßkar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶an, mit…ôr~…ĺuŇč ku saupu sipuuaj par~…ĺawaj katukuńß ajza. naj **** a mińß ¶an, sajadańß ku mir~…ĺińß…ô ¶ian tu kar~…ĺisiw, u saka ¶a ¶ajaj. u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam **** ". u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika *a ¶kj wu or *ian g…ô, is a ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôbritj from taiwan. ńß…ô is an a ¶ ¶ompr~…ĺisńß…ôd *ari…ôtj sńßow ńßost, siŇč…ôr and a ¶tor. ńß…ô ńßosts and ¶o-ńßosts num…ôrous *ari…ôtj sńßows, su ¶ńß as r~…ĺoŇč runniŇč popur~…ĺar taiwan…ôs…ô *ari…ôtj sńßow gu…ôss. u kawr~…ĺańß niza ¶in ¶iu a kawr~…ĺańß ¶i ¶uŇč a kawr~…ĺańß u dadiw-bar~…ĺud niza
S.FORM: Jacky Wu (u sulit nu Hulam: Śź≥ŚģóśÜ≤, 1962.9.26) nalecuhan i Taywan Taynan satipan. u saupu sipuuay palaway telungay. zayhan mikileh <lima ku tinghuy a kawlah> makademec sisa singangan tuway. 1978 a mihcan, u tatnenga'ay a mudadiway matahkal. 1990 a mihcan, mitelung ku saupu sipuuay palaway katukuh ayza. nay 2000 a mihcan, sayadah ku milihecian tu kalisiw, u sakacacayay. u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam 1990 ". u sulit nu Amilika Jacky Wu or Xian Ge, is a celebrity from Taiwan. He is an accomplished variety show host, singer and actor. He hosts and co-hosts numerous variety shows, such as long running popular Taiwanese variety show Guess. u kawlah niza Cinciu a kawlah Cicung a kawlah u dadiw-balud niza
